授業目的: The purpose of this course is for students to learn business fundamentals using English through situational practice, evaluation of information, and the creation of new ideas.
到達目標: Students will be able to: •	Remember and understand the main ideas and details from readings and video content through summaries, discussions, and connections  •	Synthesize information and concepts to create new ideas through charts, diagrams, videos, and inventions •	Analyze and evaluate information and data, providing comparisons, explanations, inferences, critiques, and recommendations using discourse markers and business vocabulary  •	Communicate through the understanding and use of gestures, eye contact and tone of voice while applying business concepts and vocabulary
授業の概要・背景:
Career English is designed to develop confident, fluent students who can successfully communicate in increasingly competitive, complex, and globalised business environments. It provides students with specific tools to accomplish strategic business goals that will help advance their careers when seeking employment in Japan or abroad.

This class continues to build on Career English V by learning about the fundamentals of Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR) and business. In addition, students will evaluate a company’s CSR efforts before proposing a marketing plan. Students will also utilize multi-media presentations with business English, as well as discuss case studies to apply critical thinking skills. In this way, students will evaluate a CSR problem and propose a practical solution.
授業方法: This course will use a variety of learning activities ranging from lectures, seminars, discussions, presentations, pair work, and group work.Classes are conducted face-to-face in the classroom.

第1回:
【Startup Week】Course Overview of goals, outcomes and main assignments. Catch up with teacher and students.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Sign up to google classroom and FlipGrid.
第2回:
【Startup Week】Class Introduction Tasks: What makes us happy at work - video and group discussion.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Complete handout sheet for how to improve work conditions.
第3回:
【Core Weeks①】Unit 6 Risk p52 Video TED Talk. Group Discussion on the theme.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Complete supplementary activities on risk before the next session.
第4回:
【Core Weeks②】What is business? Purpose? Brands? What is a Case study review - Background, Cause/effect, Solution. Introduction of SWOT analysis. Pair work with hand out sheets and discussion.
 (Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Think of a workplace problem that directly affects you to prepare for your first case study.
第5回:
【Core Weeks③】Unit 6 Risk. P58. In pairs work through a SWOT analysis and compare with the class.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Complete the textbook activity before the next class.
第6回:
【Core Weeks④】Case Study Report Case Study review with video. Present your analysis and findings to the class.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Review Case Study details and arrange that one person has a laptop for each group for the next Project class.
第7回:
【Core Weeks⑤】What is Crises Management? Textbook p104 B-D. Corporate Social Responsibility Video on the 2008 global financial crisis. P 105 A-D.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Complete crisis management worksheet before next project class.
第8回:
【Core Weeks⑥】Case Study Prep. Understand the rubric for grading. Practice and film video.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Practice and film the presentation if not complete and upload to FlipGrid.
第9回:
【Core Weeks⑦】Case Study Prep. Understand the rubric for grading Peer check and upload to FlipGrid.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
第10回:
【Core Weeks⑧】SWOT Presentations. Student and teacher feedback.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
第11回:
【Core Weeks⑨】Communication with customers. Textbook: p6 B-D. pp 6&7 A-C "Describing things" group activity.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Complete communication worksheet activity before the next project class.
第12回:
【Core Weeks⑩】Broad Issues in Business: Environmentalism, Globalization, Politics, Exchange rates. Nike Case study video discussion.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Think of a company that has a large-scale problem based on the issues discussed in class and prepare to explain it for the next class.
第13回:
【Core Weeks⑪】Introduction to Case Study 2. Cooperate Social responsibility video Group Discussion.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Research and think of a Japanese company with good CSR such as the examples discussed in class. Be prepared to report back next class.
第14回:
【Core Weeks⑫】CSR Online Survey Prep. Group discussion on good and bad CSR companies and industries. Are laws Necessary? CSR expectations for big and small companies.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Individually think of 3 possible questions for your CSR interview and prepare to share with a group next class.
第15回:
【Core Weeks⑬】CSR Online Survey Prep Design your surveys ahead of next week using close-ended and multiple-choice questions.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Complete your first draft for your survey before the next textbook class.
第16回:
【Core Weeks⑭】CSR Data collection Each group member should survey around 10-15 people.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Conduct Google question survey if possible.
第17回:
【Core Weeks⑮】Continue CSR Data collection Each group member should survey around 10-15 people.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Conduct Google question survey if possible.
第18回:
【Core Weeks⑯】CSR Online Data Analysis in groups. How do the results impact your case study? Is the CSR policy effective?
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Continue analysis and prepare script and visuals.
第19回:
【Core Weeks⑰】CSR Online Data Analysis in groups. Does the CSR have a meaningful impact on consumer habits? How will the results be visualized?
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Continue analysis and prepare script and visuals.
第20回:
【Core Weeks⑱】Customer Service Textbook p96 A-B. p97 A-D. Complete rules for customer service worksheet.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Bring a laptop for next project class.
第21回:
【Core Weeks⑲】CSR Case Study video outlining. Storyboard, script, and edit a 3-minute video of a company for its CSR policies, survey data. Watch an example CSR video.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Start the first draft of the script and storyboard.
第22回:
【Core Weeks⑳】CSR Outlining Start using an online animated video website to create a slideshow. CSR example of video 2.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Experiment with video editing to suggest ideas for group work in the next project class.
第23回:
【Core Weeks㉑】CSR Outlining Groups discuss animation ideas and edit storyboard and script.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Make a free account from one of the two online resources in class (or another) and experiment with video editing to suggest ideas for group work in the next project class.
第24回:
【Core Weeks㉒】Textbook: Unit 10 - Customer Service Case Study. Utilize all skills from previous lessons to complete the task in groups.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》

Continue work on CSR video.
Bring a laptop to the next project class.
第25回:
【Core Weeks㉓】Finish editing 3-minute case study videos in groups. Get Feedback from the teacher and other groups. Understand grading rubric and guidelines.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Finish final edits of video and upload to FlipGrid.
第26回:
【Core Weeks㉔】CSR Case Study Viewing and feedback.
(Face-to-face) 《90 minutes》
Finish final edits of video and upload to FlipGrid.
第27回:

Online class (On-demand format and/or Task-oriented format《90 minutes》

Online class (On-demand format and/or Task-oriented format《90 minutes》

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic: 各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する以下の能力が養成されます。言語教育科目：１．言語コミュニケーション能力：外国語力を生かし、積極的に発信できる。２．異文化理解・多文化共生力：異文化に対する感受性をもち、多様な文化と共生できる。
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: SWOT Presentation (30%); CSR Case Study videos (30%); Class Participation (20%): Assessments 20%
